metadata.title: Energy Sector Predictive Maintenance API
metadata.description: This API provides functionalities for predictive analytics to ensure timely maintenance of energy infrastructure, mitigating unplanned downtimes. The API enables users to retrieve maintenance schedules, manage incident reports, analyze sensor data, and assess potential failure risks.
